title: Smoky Char-Grilled Malaysian Bok Choi Wrap
description: A date-night twist on classic Malaysian cuisine featuring char-grilled bok choi and velvety peanut sauce wrapped in a pandan leaf.
instructions: Brush bok choi with peanut oil and grill until charred, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In a blender or food processor, combine peanut butter, coconut milk, garlic, ginger, lime juice, salt, pepper, cumin, coriander, and brown sugar. Blend until smooth.
Season the peanut sauce with salt to taste.
Warm the pandan leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
To assemble the wrap, place a portion of grilled bok choi on the center of the pandan leaf, followed by a dollop of peanut sauce and a sprinkle of crushed peanuts.
